value.found_quote: Handoff moves an existing thread and its Git state between your local computer and a connected remote host. Use it to start work locally, continue in a worktree on a remote computer, and bring the thread back later.
value.rationale: The page has a section "Hand off a thread between hosts" that explicitly describes moving a thread and its Git state between local and remote hosts, directly substantiating the claim. It is described as a current feature with no deprecation notice.
